wares.name: Pixel Art
wares.description: A fully featured pixel art editor with pencil, fill, eyedropper, undo/redo, colour palette, and PNG export. Draw pixel art right inside WordPress.
wares.author: Bazaar

wares.name: Invoice Generator
wares.description: Create professional invoices, manage clients, track payment status (Draft → Sent → Paid → Overdue), and export PDFs — entirely within WordPress.
wares.author: Bazaar

wares.name: Focus Timer
wares.description: A beautiful Pomodoro focus timer with ambient sound mixer (rain, brown noise, white noise), session task list, and a GitHub-style session history heatmap.
wares.author: Bazaar
